negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Block verification does not support image/video Phase 2 settlement fee extraction and therefore cannot mirror multimodal Phase 2 pricing for all three media precompiles.
related_but_insufficient_code: crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs includes AUDIO_CALL_PRECOMPILE in the supported two-phase helper and fee branch, but not IMAGE_CALL_PRECOMPILE or VIDEO_CALL_PRECOMPILE.

notes: The verifier rejects unsupported image/video two-phase commitments before any delivered-attribute pricing can be checked.
rationale: The verifier imports the multimodal constants, extraction helpers, and fee calculators, includes those addresses in long-running checks, and maps extraction failures for dimensions/duration into verification errors rather than fallbacks. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: Block verification must recognize image, audio, and video precompiles as long-running Phase 2 settlements and reject the block if it cannot extract the required output attributes for their dedicated fee calculations.
suggested_falsification_tests: Construct Phase 2 settlement verification cases for image/audio/video where delivery results are valid and malformed; assert valid cases compute the same fees as the payload builder and malformed cases reject verification.
summary: Verifier media Phase 2 pricing is only partial.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Construct Phase 2 settlement verification cases for image/audio/video where delivery results are valid and malformed; assert valid cases compute the same fees as the payload builder and malformed cases reject verification.
title: Verifier mirrors multimodal Phase 2 pricing
